_meta.description: Reference catalog of 30 MCP tools for the tool_router dataset. Used by the dataset generator to build prompts.
_meta.rare_tool_note: Rare tools appear as the correct answer in <2-3% of total examples. They must still appear occasionally in the available_tools list of other examples so the model sees their descriptions, but they are rarely the ground-truth answer.
_meta.naming_convention_note: Tool names intentionally mix styles (kebab-case corp names, snake_case, short IDs) to mimic realistic MCP server registries.

tools.name: corp-kariya-weather-app
tools.description: Provides weather forecasts, current conditions, and severe weather alerts for a given location.

tools.name: safety_proposal
tools.description: Analyzes driving context and provides real-time safety recommendations to the driver.

tools.name: face_emotion
tools.description: Analyzes facial expressions and emotions to detect driver fatigue, distraction, or stress.

tools.name: corp-scheduler-app
tools.description: Creates, reads, updates, and deletes calendar events and manages the driver's meeting schedule.

tools.name: in_car_analytics
tools.description: Provides driving analytics and vehicle telemetry including speed, fuel efficiency, and trip statistics.

tools.name: nav_route_planner
tools.description: Plans optimal routes, provides turn-by-turn navigation, and recalculates routes around obstacles.

tools.name: traffic_alert_service
tools.description: Reports real-time traffic conditions, road incidents, construction zones, and estimated delays.

tools.name: media_player_ctrl
tools.description: Controls in-car media playback including play, pause, skip, volume, and playlist management.

tools.name: climate_control
tools.description: Manages cabin temperature, fan speed, heated seats, and ventilation settings.

tools.name: vehicle_diagnostics
tools.description: Reads and reports OBD-II fault codes, engine health, tyre pressure, and maintenance due dates.

tools.name: corp-contact-sync
tools.description: Accesses the driver's contact list, searches contacts, and retrieves phone numbers or addresses.

tools.name: call_handler
tools.description: Initiates, receives, holds, and terminates hands-free phone calls.

tools.name: sms_messenger
tools.description: Reads incoming text messages aloud and composes short text reply messages via voice.

tools.name: fuel_station_finder
tools.description: Locates nearby petrol, diesel, or EV charging stations with live pricing and availability.

tools.name: parking_locator
tools.description: Finds available parking spots near a destination, shows pricing, and supports reservation.

tools.name: poi_search
tools.description: Searches for points of interest such as restaurants, cafes, hospitals, ATMs, and shops near the current location.

tools.name: trip_logger
tools.description: Records trip history including routes, distances, durations, and timestamps and exports reports.

tools.name: remote_vehicle_lock
tools.description: Remotely locks or unlocks vehicle doors, boot, and windows and reports current lock state.

tools.name: battery_status_monitor
tools.description: Reports EV battery state of charge, estimated driving range, and current charging session status.

tools.name: ev_charging_scheduler
tools.description: Schedules EV charging sessions for off-peak hours and optimises charging cost based on tariff data.

tools.name: news_briefing
tools.description: Delivers summarised news headlines, sports scores, and personalised content as a brief audio update.

tools.name: package_tracker
tools.description: Tracks parcel deliveries across carriers, provides ETA updates, and alerts on delivery status changes.

tools.name: toll_payment_service
tools.description: Processes automatic toll payments, maintains account balance, and provides toll cost estimates for routes.

tools.name: health_monitor
tools.description: Monitors driver biometrics such as heart rate, blood oxygen, and cumulative fatigue score from wearables.

tools.name: corp-cloud-sync
tools.description: Syncs vehicle personalisation settings, seat positions, and preferences to the driver's cloud profile.

tools.name: emergency_sos
tools.description: Triggers an emergency SOS alert, shares GPS location, and contacts emergency services and next-of-kin.

tools.name: roadside_assistance
tools.description: Requests roadside assistance for breakdowns, flat tyres, or lockouts and tracks the technician's ETA.

tools.name: insurance_claims
tools.description: Initiates, documents, and tracks vehicle insurance claims including photo upload and damage assessment.

tools.name: home_automation_bridge
tools.description: Controls smart home devices such as lights, thermostats, and door locks when approaching or leaving home.

tools.name: corp-fleet-manager
tools.description: Manages a fleet of corporate vehicles: tracks locations, assigns vehicles to drivers, and reports utilisation.
